name: Investor Portal

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with investor groupings and main content area

description: Investor management portal tracking NDA status, access history, and document activity per investor. Centralizes the bidder and limited-partner roster for deal rooms.

page_briefs.investors: Investor list page presents a sortable data table of all investors and bidders with columns for firm name, primary contact, NDA status, invited date, last-active date, documents viewed count, and access tier. Each row is rendered as a team-member-style row with firm avatar, contact chips, and status pills for at-a-glance scanning.
page_briefs.investor-detail: Investor detail page opens with a detail header showing firm name, logo, primary contact, NDA signed date, and access tier badge. An activity feed lists every document view, download request, Q&A post, and login event with timestamps. Below, a list-mode file browser shows all documents this investor has viewed, requested, or been granted access to.
